summary: Plan-only PR inventory assessment. No GitHub mutations are recommended. All five PRs are open and non-security-sensitive in the preflight artifact. None has the complete merge preflight required for merge_candidate; three carry active waiting-on-author labels, and two otherwise ready PRs are kept independent pending full merge/review preflight or check repair.

actions.reason: Independent maintainer-ready PR, but missing required merge preflight.
Active waiting-on-author and compatibility/session-state risk require maintainer judgment before merge or repair planning.
Active waiting-on-author plus a failing auto-response check block merge recommendation and require maintainer/author follow-up.
Small contributor PR appears repairable, but failing checks block merge. A follow-up repair of the contributor branch is appropriate before any merge recommendation.
Active waiting-on-author plus compatibility/auth-provider risk and failing core checks require maintainer judgment before repair or merge planning.
Emit an executable repair artifact for the affected contributor branch; do not merge until repaired, validated, reviewed, and re-planned.

needs_human: #78113: status waiting on author with compatibility/session-state risk.
#78115: status waiting on author with failing auto-response check.
#78199: status waiting on author with compatibility/auth-provider risk and failing core checks.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #78139 so the small cron disable hint change can be revalidated after resolving the failing boundary check. Preserve @kate credit and keep the diff limited to the existing cron CLI/test surfaces unless the failing check proves a narrowly related adjustment is required.
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repair follow-up for Clownfish cluster live-pr-inventory-20260617T015524-097.

Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/78139 by @kate. This carries forward the cron disable/list hint fix and preserves attribution.

Validation:
- pnpm check:changed
- pnpm -s vitest run src/cron/service/ops.update.disable-and-list.test.ts
credit_notes: Credit original contributor @kate in the repair commit/PR body.
